---
title: "SpeciesRichnessMaps"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup_species_richness_maps}
# Chunk name suggestion: setup_species_richness_maps
# Purpose: load packages, shared functions, and the hex grid for mapping.
# remotes::install_github("Marine-Biodiversity-Conservation-Lab/chondrichthyes.species.ranges")

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(patchwork)
library(rnaturalearth)
# Load shared functions
source(here("mapping/00_functions.R"))

# Load hex cells (precomputed)
hex_path <- here("data/processed/hex.rds")
if (!file.exists(hex_path)) {
  stop("Missing data/processed/hex.rds. Run 01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd first.")
}
hex <- readRDS(hex_path)

# Shared map + scatter latitude window (°N, WGS84); maps (coord_sf ylim) and scatters use this
pub_lat_ylim_deg <- c(-90, 90)
```

```{r data_loading}
# Load required spatial inputs. If these files are missing, run
# mapping/01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd first.
# This script expects:
# - Precomputed ranges and metric outputs in data/processed

# Species ranges (precomputed)
ranges_path <- here("data/processed/ranges.rds")

ranges <- readRDS(ranges_path)

# Skate/ray metric grids (precomputed)
hex_metrics_skates_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_skates.rds")
hex_metrics_rays_path <- here("data/processed/hex_with_metrics_rays.rds")
if (!file.exists(hex_metrics_skates_path) || !file.exists(hex_metrics_rays_path)) {
  stop("Missing hex_with_metrics_*.rds. Run 01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd first.")
}
hex_with_metrics_skates <- readRDS(hex_metrics_skates_path)
hex_with_metrics_rays <- readRDS(hex_metrics_rays_path)

# Optional: unique-richness grid (precomputed)
hex_in_path <- here("data/processed/hex_in_richness_unique.rds")
hex_in <- if (file.exists(hex_in_path)) readRDS(hex_in_path) else NULL

# Subset ranges for summaries
ranges_skates <- ranges %>%
  filter(order_ == "RAJIFORMES")
ranges_rays <- ranges %>%
  filter(order_ %in% c("RHINOPRISTIFORMES", "MYLIOBATIFORMES", "TORPEDINIFORMES"))
```

```{r spatial_biodiversity_function}
# Chunk name suggestion: spatial_biodiversity_function
# Purpose: reference the shared biodiversity metric function.
# calculate_hex_metrics2() is sourced from mapping/00_functions.R
# tic("Hex biodiversity metrics")
# hex_with_metrics2 <- calculate_hex_metrics2(ranges_skates, hex)
# toc()
```

```{r mapping_function}
# Chunk name suggestion: mapping_function
# Purpose: reference the shared plotting function.
# plot_species_richness_map() is sourced from mapping/00_functions.R
```

```{r run_skate_ray_richness_maps labels and legends}
# Chunk name suggestion: run_skate_ray_richness_maps
# Purpose: compute richness metrics for skates/rays and export maps.
# Use precomputed metrics from data_loading
# Latitude extent for maps comes from pub_lat_ylim_deg in setup_species_richness_maps (not set here).

# Toggle panel label and title (set TRUE/FALSE as needed)
show_panel_label <- TRUE
show_panel_title <- TRUE

# Build the panel title string based on toggles
make_panel_title <- function(label, title) {
  if (show_panel_label && show_panel_title) {
    return(sprintf("%s %s", label, title))
  }
  if (show_panel_label) {
    return(label)
  }
  if (show_panel_title) {
    return(title)
  }
  NULL
}

# Remove title elements entirely when toggled off
apply_title_toggle <- function(plot_obj, title_text) {
  if (is.null(title_text)) {
    plot_obj + labs(title = NULL) + theme(plot.title = element_blank())
  } else {
    plot_obj
  }
}

# Map metrics of interest (apply_lat_axis_labels is in 00_functions.R)
skate_title <- make_panel_title("a.", "skate richness")
ray_title <- make_panel_title("c.", "ray richness")

species_richness_map_skate <- plot_species_richness_map(
  hex_with_metrics_skates,
  map_title = skate_title,
  ylim_lat_deg = pub_lat_ylim_deg
)
species_richness_map_skate <- apply_title_toggle(species_richness_map_skate, skate_title)
species_richness_map_skate <- apply_lat_axis_labels(species_richness_map_skate)
# species_richness_map_skate

species_richness_map_ray <- plot_species_richness_map(
  hex_with_metrics_rays,
  map_title = ray_title,
  ylim_lat_deg = pub_lat_ylim_deg
)
species_richness_map_ray <- apply_title_toggle(species_richness_map_ray, ray_title)
species_richness_map_ray <- apply_lat_axis_labels(species_richness_map_ray)
# species_richness_map_ray

# Arrange plots on vertical page
full_output <- species_richness_map_skate + species_richness_map_ray + plot_layout(ncol = 1)
# Date tag for output filenames (yymmdd)
date_tag <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")
# Export to PDF and PNG
ggsave(
  here(sprintf("mapping/figures/SkateRayRichness_%s.pdf", date_tag)),
  plot = full_output,
  width = 7,
  height = 10,
  units = "in"
)

ggsave(
  filename = here(sprintf("mapping/figures/SkateRayRichness_%s.png", date_tag)),
  plot = full_output,
  width = 7,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r publication_four_panel_pointer}
# Four-panel figure (maps + latitude–richness scatters) lives in its own report so layout code does
# not depend on objects from this file’s map chunk. Knit:
#   mapping/03_SkateRayRichnessPublication.Rmd
# Reversed viridis variant → 03b_SkateRayRichnessPublicationReversed.Rmd
# Use the same pub_lat_ylim_deg here and there if you want matching vertical extent.
```

```{r summary_statistics}
# Chunk name suggestion: summary_statistics
# Purpose: quick checks on skate/ray ranges and compilation years.
str(ranges_skates)
length(unique(ranges_skates$sci_name))

hist(ranges_skates$yrcompiled)

ranges_skates$sci_name[ranges_skates$yrcompiled == 2022]


str(ranges_rays)
length(unique(ranges_rays$sci_name))

hist(ranges_rays$yrcompiled)
```
